LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF ROMULO ORTIZ' MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION BY OPPOSING PARTY WAS PRESENTED TO THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR #1558.
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR JUDGMENT AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, ROMULO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STATE BOARD OF EQUALIZATION $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-09-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
